title: SecretUri field privatization with accessor methods is correct design
description: Making backend/path/params private and adding backend()/path()/param() accessors is the right call. Public mutable fields would have allowed backends to mutate URI state post-construction, creating silent divergence between the URI string and actual backend config. The private + accessor design also preserves ability to change internal representation (e.g. multi-value params) without a breaking API change.
